description: Vertical graphic with a dark navy-blue background showing faint stylized data and technology imagery: glowing binary digits (1s and 0s), abstract grid lines, bar-chart and circuit-like motifs, and small blue light particles. In the upper-left corner is a solid blue box with white serif text reading 'Making America Safe Again'. The central headline is large bold white sans-serif text: 'USCIS Partnering with ICE to Use Advanced Analytics in Targeting Criminal Aliens'. Along the bottom are two official seals with white text labels: the U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services seal ('U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services') and the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement seal ('U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement'), both bearing the DHS eagle emblem.
notable_text: Making America Safe Again. USCIS Partnering with ICE to Use Advanced Analytics in Targeting Criminal Aliens.
